data.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md 'Git workflow / land through Gerrit' section: replace the auto-lander/land-contract/Autosubmit flow with 'Submit via Gerrit when LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1; Gerrit rebases-and-submits server-side (Rebase-If-Necessary); on a textual conflict, git fetch && git rebase origin/main, re-push, re-Submit; there is no bot'.
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md: same rewrite; remove land/land-status/Autosubmit/auto-lander references and the lander_down fallback framing (there is no lander).
- [ ] docs/your-first-change.md + README.md: update the landing pointer to the Submit-when-green model.
- [ ] Remove/redirect land-contract.md references across docs.
- [ ] Note the post-merge main CI + manual-revert safety net.
- [ ] No stale references to the auto-lander/Autosubmit/land command remain in docs (grep clean).
data.title: Rewrite landing docs for the Submit-when-green / Gerrit-rebases model
